name: feature.code-exec.agents
description: Code Interpreter agent (ADR 0114). Drives the sandboxed code-execution node through chat — composes the existing AI chat + the feature.code-exec.nodes pack; no new chat system. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Code Interpreter
agents.description: Runs code in a sandbox (behind a human approval gate) to compute answers, analyze data, and produce artifacts. Uses openwop:feature.code-exec.nodes.run; honest-off when no sandbox adapter is wired.
